title: SR 11-14: Supervisory Letter SR 11-14 on         Supervisory Expectations for Risk Management of Agricultural Credit Risk  -- October 25, 2011
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 11-14 on         Supervisory Expectations for Risk Management of Agricultural Credit Risk  -- October 25, 2011
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 11-14
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations: This letter applies to all banking organizations with significant exposure to agriculture-related credit risk, including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK
3.  See, for example, SR letter 84-16, "Farm and Agricultural-Related Loans." Return to text

BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF BANKING SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT: 3.  See, for example, SR letter 84-16, "Farm and Agricultural-Related Loans." Return to text 5.  See http://www.federalreserve.gov/feedback.cfm. Return to text
